prompt: A warm, off-white, textured paper background, with subtle imperfections and halftone dot patterns like a retro screen print. The texture is gentle and does not overwhelm the content.
description: Here's your unique social media background, inspired by vintage Indian matchbox art and retro screen-printed posters, featuring a stylized girl holding a glowing diya. I've focused on creating visual depth and interest with a textured background and an asymmetric layout to give it that $10,000 design agency feel.
